notes: Ground-truth exogenous events for FR economie pilot. Windows and expected levels fixed ex ante. Do NOT adjust post-observation.

events.label: 1973 oil embargo and price shock
events.source: OPEC embargo October 1973, price quadrupled by January 1974

expected.Sigma: increase — demand surge relative to industrial capacity
expected.C: decrease or stagnate — symbolic accumulation disrupted
expected.recovery_signal: R elevation if adaptation occurs (energy substitution)

events.falsification_prediction: Σ signal disappears when event date shifted ±5 years

events.label: EU Single Market completion
events.source: Maastricht Treaty 1992, Single Market operative January 1993

expected.S: increase — diffusion of European economic norms
expected.C: increase post-1993 — cumulative symbolic gain from market integration

events.falsification_prediction: C signal absent in placebo window 1985-89

events.label: Global Financial Crisis 2007-2009
events.source: Lehman Brothers collapse September 2008; FR GDP -3.1% in 2009

expected.R: decrease — reduced R&D investment during crisis
expected.Sigma: increase — mismatch between demand and reduced capacity
expected.C: decrease or negative ΔC during crisis; recovery if R rebounds

events.falsification_prediction: O/R/Sigma pattern absent in negative control 2002-2006

events.label: COVID-19 pandemic shock

expected.S: may increase if digital/remote-work symbolic diffusion occurred
expected.C: ambiguous: disruption then recovery if S rebounds

events.falsification_prediction: Σ spike absent in placebo 2015; present in 2020
